---
name: 📝 Content Addition
about: Propose new content for a section or a new section entirely
title: '[CONTENT] '
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

## 📋 Content Type

What type of content are you proposing?
- [ ] New section
- [ ] Additional guide in existing section
- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Diagrams/Visuals
- [ ] Cheat sheet
- [ ] Case study
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## 📍 Target Section

Which section should this content be added to?
- Section Number: [e.g., 15-offline-vibe-coding]
- Section Name: [e.g., Offline Vibe Coding]

## 📖 Content Outline

Provide an outline of what you want to add:

```markdown
# Title of Your Content

## Introduction
[Brief overview]

## Main Topics
1. [Topic 1]
2. [Topic 2]
3. [Topic 3]

## Examples/Code
[Describe examples you'll include]

## Key Takeaways
[What will readers learn?]
```

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

What will readers gain from this content?
- [ ] Understand a concept
- [ ] Learn a tool/technology
- [ ] Follow a workflow
- [ ] Build a project
- [ ] Solve a problem

## 📚 References & Sources

List any resources you'll reference:
- Documentation links
- Tutorials
- Articles
- Personal experience

## ✍️ Are You Willing to Write This?

- [ ] Yes, I'll create the content
- [ ] I can provide outline only
- [ ] Looking for someone else to write

## 💡 Additional Notes

Any other information about this content addition.

---

**Thank you for contributing to this knowledge base!** 🙌
